## Gene expression analysis

```{r expression_similarity}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(as.logical(pcg_report$settings$conf$expression$similarity_analysis))
#| output: asis
#| child: pcgr_quarto_report/expression/expression_similarity.qmd 

```

<br>

```{r expression_outliers}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(NROW(pcg_report$content$expression$outliers) > 0)
#| output: asis
#| child: pcgr_quarto_report/expression/expression_outliers.qmd

```

<br>

```{r expression_immune_contexture}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(NROW(pcg_report$content$expression$immune_contexture) > 0)
#| output: asis
#| child: pcgr_quarto_report/expression/immune_contexture.qmd

```
